response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: N/A (no vocal music identified). 2. JSON Usage: Manual transcription utilized as the Reference JSON provided no lyrics. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timed precisely to IRyS's vocal bursts. Applied aggressive truncation for rapid speech and ensured semantic continuity during code-switching between English and Japanese.

subtitles.original: 喜んでるね！
subtitles.english: Everyone's so happy!

subtitles.original: First up, we have the Acrylic Diorama StandRyS!
subtitles.english: First up, we have the Acrylic Diorama StandRyS!

subtitles.original: Illustrations by the beautiful Inonopisu-sensei!
subtitles.english: Illustrations by the beautiful Inonopisu-sensei!

subtitles.original: こちらの衣装もピスケ先生なんですよ。
subtitles.english: This outfit is also by Pisu-sensei!

subtitles.original: This diorama stand features IRyS...
subtitles.english: This diorama stand features IRyS...

subtitles.original: ...in her race queen outfit, perfectly capturing
subtitles.english: ...in her race queen outfit, perfectly capturing

subtitles.original: the atmosphere of this 3D live stage! Yes!
subtitles.english: the atmosphere of this 3D live stage! Yes!

subtitles.original: みんなも買うよね！
subtitles.english: Everyone's buying it, right?

subtitles.original: Yes! Hi!
subtitles.english: Yes! Hi!

subtitles.original: And then the second one is this one!
subtitles.english: And then the second one is this one!

subtitles.original: Yes! The ChibiRyS Tote Bag! It's so cute!
subtitles.english: Yes! The ChibiRyS Tote Bag! It's so cute!

subtitles.original: Illustration on the tote bag is by Lien-sensei!
subtitles.english: Illustration on the tote bag is by Lien-sensei!

subtitles.original: いつもLien先生、ありがとう、
subtitles.english: It's always Lien-sensei, thank you,

subtitles.original: Thank you so much Lien all the time! So cute!
subtitles.english: Thank you so much Lien all the time! So cute!

subtitles.original: This tote features mini IRyS in her casual outfit!
subtitles.english: This tote features mini IRyS in her casual outfit!

subtitles.original: Yes, drawn by Lien-sensei, so cute!
subtitles.english: Yes, drawn by Lien-sensei, so cute!

subtitles.original: Lien先生に描いてもらった、カジュアルアイリス...
subtitles.english: Drawn by Lien-sensei, it's casual IRyS...

subtitles.original: ...ちびになってますの、可愛いトート。
subtitles.english: ...in chibi form, what a cute tote bag.

subtitles.original: ぜひ普段使いしてください。
subtitles.english: Please use it for your everyday needs.

subtitles.original: お出かけで使ってね！はい！
subtitles.english: Use it when you go out! Yes!

subtitles.original: Please use it when you go shopping and whatnot!
subtitles.english: Please use it when you go shopping and whatnot!

subtitles.original: With this simple design, it's perfect for daily use!
subtitles.english: With this simple design, it's perfect for daily use!

subtitles.original: You can pair it with other merch following this...
subtitles.english: You can pair it with other merch following this...

subtitles.original: ...so show off your IRyS pride! Yay!
subtitles.english: ...so show off your IRyS pride! Yay!

subtitles.original: あの、この後に紹介するグッズとも合わせて...
subtitles.english: You can use it together with the merch coming up...

subtitles.original: ...楽しみにしててね！はい！
subtitles.english: ...so please look forward to it! Yes!

subtitles.original: And then the third one is...
subtitles.english: And then the third one is...

subtitles.original: ...the Race QueenRyS Keychain!
subtitles.english: ...the Race QueenRyS Keychain!

subtitles.original: こちらの素晴らしい衣装のキーチェーンです。
subtitles.english: It's a keychain of this wonderful outfit.

subtitles.original: 可愛いやろ？あ、欲しいの？
subtitles.english: Isn't it cute? Oh, you want it?

subtitles.original: Yeah, I think they want it already!
subtitles.english: Yeah, I think they want it already!

subtitles.original: まだダメ！ここからだよ！
subtitles.english: Not yet! It starts from here!

subtitles.original: え、注文するよね？
subtitles.english: You're going to order it, right?

subtitles.original: You guys are going to buy it, right? Yeah!
subtitles.english: You guys are going to buy it, right? Yeah!

subtitles.original: もう1セットで終わらないよね？
subtitles.english: You won't stop at just one set, right?

subtitles.original: うん、うん、もう...
subtitles.english: Yeah, yeah...

subtitles.original: ...爆買いしてくれるそうです！はい！
subtitles.english: ...they say they're going on a shopping spree! Yes!

subtitles.original: This is the new plushie featuring my new outfit!
subtitles.english: This is the new plushie featuring my new outfit!

subtitles.original: 新衣装のアイリスがぬいぐるみのキーホルダーに！
subtitles.english: New outfit IRyS has become a plushie keychain!

subtitles.original: It's cute on its own, but you can also carry it...
subtitles.english: It's cute on its own, but you can also carry it...

subtitles.original: ...with its face peeking out from the tote pocket!
subtitles.english: ...with its face peeking out from the tote pocket!

subtitles.original: ぜひトートバッグの中にバーン！と入れちゃって...
subtitles.english: Please pop it right into the tote bag...

subtitles.original: ...一緒にお出かけしてね！
subtitles.english: ...and go out together!

subtitles.original: And then the last one is the... YabaiRyS Pouch!
subtitles.english: And then the last one is the... YabaiRyS Pouch!

subtitles.original: Yes! みんなの大好きなヤバイリスだよ！
subtitles.english: Yes! It's everyone's favorite YabaiRyS!

subtitles.original: 何を考えてるんでしょう？
subtitles.english: I wonder what she's thinking?

subtitles.original: I wonder what she's thinking with that face?
subtitles.english: I wonder what she's thinking with that face?

subtitles.original: Yes, YabaiRyS is back again!
subtitles.english: Yes, YabaiRyS is back again!

subtitles.original: This face pouch with its high impact design...
subtitles.english: This face pouch with its high impact design...

subtitles.original: ...yes, it's high impact!
subtitles.english: ...yes, it's high impact!

subtitles.original: Can also be attached to the bag handle!
subtitles.english: Can also be attached to the bag handle!

subtitles.original: さあ先ほど紹介したトートバッグの...
subtitles.english: Now, as for that tote bag I introduced earlier...

subtitles.original: ...取っ手にバーン！と付けるととっても可愛いよ！
subtitles.english: ...if you pop it on the handle, it's so cute!

subtitles.original: Yes, you can use it with the tote bag...
subtitles.english: Yes, you can use it with the tote bag...

subtitles.original: ...and it'll be a perfect set!
subtitles.english: ...and it'll be a perfect set!

subtitles.original: Tote, plushie, and pouch as a three-piece set...
subtitles.english: Tote, plushie, and pouch as a three-piece set...

subtitles.original: ...show off your IRyS love around the world! Yes!
subtitles.english: ...show off your IRyS love around the world! Yes!

subtitles.original: This is a pouch, by the way, just clarifying.
subtitles.english: This is a pouch, by the way, just clarifying.

subtitles.original: これはポーチになってます。Tiny things go in it.
subtitles.english: This is a pouch. Tiny things go in it.

subtitles.original: Okay, and then here are the full set bonuses!
subtitles.english: Okay, and then here are the full set bonuses!

subtitles.original: Yes! The postcard!
subtitles.english: Yes! The postcard!

subtitles.original: Illustration is the same from Pisuke-sensei...
subtitles.english: Illustration is the same from Pisuke-sensei...

subtitles.original: ...for the acrylic stand.
subtitles.english: ...for the acrylic stand.

subtitles.original: ピスケ先生のイラストをポストカードでも！
subtitles.english: Pisu-sensei's illustration is also on the postcard!

subtitles.original: Limited edition has a handwritten message! Yes!
subtitles.english: Limited edition has a handwritten message! Yes!

subtitles.original: 数量限定版は直筆メッセージ & 箔押し複製サイン...
subtitles.english: Limited edition has a handwritten message & signature...

subtitles.original: ...箔押し複製サイン入りポストカードです！
subtitles.english: ...duplicate signature postcard!

subtitles.original: メッセージは直筆の方です。はい！
subtitles.english: The message is the handwritten part. Yes!

subtitles.original: So, you guys are buying limited, right? Yeah!
subtitles.english: So, you guys are buying limited, right? Yeah!

subtitles.original: I want you guys to be as hyped as them! Yeah!
subtitles.english: I want you guys to be as hyped as them! Yeah!

subtitles.original: Standard version has a foil-stamped autograph...
subtitles.english: Standard version has a foil-stamped autograph...

subtitles.original: ...and message as well.
subtitles.english: ...and message as well.

subtitles.original: 通常版も箔押し複製サイン & メッセージ入り...
subtitles.english: The standard version also has a signature & message...

subtitles.original: ...ポストカードです。So you can get both!
subtitles.english: ...postcard. So you can get both!

subtitles.original: 限定版も通常版もぜひゲットしてね！ Yeah!
subtitles.english: Both limited and standard, please get them! Yeah!

subtitles.original: みんな可愛いな。You guys are so cute.
subtitles.english: Everyone's so cute. You guys are so cute.

subtitles.original: ああ、ああ、they're so cute.
subtitles.english: Ah, ah, they're so cute.

subtitles.original: Look at how big their heads are.
subtitles.english: Look at how big their heads are.

subtitles.original: 頭でかいね。
subtitles.english: Their heads are huge.

subtitles.original: あ、刺される。あ、痛いよ！痛い！痛い！痛いよ！
subtitles.english: Ah, I'm getting poked. Ah, it hurts! It hurts!

subtitles.original: ああ... もう君たちはしょうがないな。
subtitles.english: Ah... you guys are hopeless.

subtitles.original: Plenty more announcements coming up! Yeah!
subtitles.english: Plenty more announcements coming up! Yeah!

subtitles.original: If you can tell, I'm already introducing merch...
subtitles.english: If you can tell, I'm already introducing merch...

subtitles.original: ...so there's a lot of other things coming up.
subtitles.english: ...so there's a lot of other things coming up.

subtitles.original: この後もね、色んな大きな告知があるんで...
subtitles.english: After this too, there are various big announcements...

subtitles.original: ...ぜひ最後まで見ててくださいね。
subtitles.english: ...so please watch until the end.

subtitles.original: 楽しみにしててね。
subtitles.english: Please look forward to it.

subtitles.original: Big announcements coming, so stay tuned!
subtitles.english: Big announcements coming, so stay tuned!

subtitles.original: じゃあ、続きやるぞ！ Let's go!
subtitles.english: Now, let's continue! Let's go!
